page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: INST888 or INST802.

Formerly: INST888.

INST808 Seminar in Research Methods and Data Analysis (3 Credits) Topics and issues in information studies research. Design and conduct of research project.

Restriction: Permission of INFO-College of Information Studies. And must be in Information Studies (Doctoral) program; or permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
